results.rendered_html:
asvara a.
1 Having a bad voice.
2 Indistinct, not loud, in a low tone (as a speech).
— raḥ
1 A low tone.
2 A consonant.
3 Absence of any accent.
— raṃ ind. Not aloud, in a low tone.
